identity.role: Agent must choose one primary role
identity.fantasy: Agent must define one short original visual and gameplay fantasy.
silhouette: Agent must define one recognizable large shape
Agent must define one readable body or costume shape
Agent must define one movement cue

primary.name: Universal attack body action
primary.counterplay: Agent must state a specific spacing, interrupt, or punish option.
primary.interruption: Agent must state what happens if interrupted before the spawn event.

ability.name: Signature ability
ability.description: Agent must describe one original ability with one clear purpose.
ability.counterplay: Agent must state a specific counterplay option.
ability.interruption: Agent must state what happens if interrupted before its event frame.

weaknesses: Agent must define one concrete timing or spacing weakness
Agent must define one second concrete weakness

artBrief.spriteSheet: One right-facing body-only sheet per state, 256x256 cells, row-major frame order, transparent runtime PNG, feet-center pivot.
artBrief.windUpCue: Agent must describe the readable startup cue.
artBrief.impactCue: Agent must describe the body recoil and separate event-driven VFX cue.
artBrief.recoveryCue: Agent must describe the punishable recovery cue.
avoid: Named franchise characters, assets, logos, terminology, or move lists
Weapon, muzzle flash, projectile, impact, trail, or dust baked into body sheets
Unreadable details or asymmetry that breaks horizontal mirroring

stateTransitions: idle|walk -> jump_start -> rise -> fall -> land -> idle
implementationNotes.notes: Simulation owns events and transitions. Renderer only displays the selected state/frame and event-driven cosmetics.
